note: phase_mode=lightweight → middleware-candidates is advisory (does not block execution planning). architecture_fingerprint is null in draft and injected at publish to match the parent target-architecture.md.

candidates.name: TmrParser
candidates.purpose: Parse a structured TMR: YAML block into the internal TMR record, field-for-field, rejecting unknown/missing keys and non-canonical enum members with named errors.
candidates.rationale: Typed I/O, isolatable (pure parse over a string, no IO deps), reused by F′, the five guardrails, and emission. The canonical schema is the single source it validates against.

candidates.name: SpineCoverageChecker
candidates.purpose: Pure function: given the roadmap US set and parsed TMRs, return pass | uncovered-US list | duplicate-US list for the F′ gate.
candidates.rationale: Deterministic, isolatable pure function reused across all three enforcement layers (skill-side pre-check, debate.py fallback, and mirrored by Fizzy sweep) — exactly the reuse-across-surfaces criterion. Consumes MW-001's output.

candidates.name: ProvenanceJournalWriter
candidates.purpose: Append-only writer over subject_type ∈ {test, node}: takes a typed transition record, durably appends one jsonl line, never rewrites a prior record.
candidates.rationale: Typed record in, append-only jsonl out; isolatable (file append, injectable path); reused by guardrail aggregation, Phase-8 promotion, and depth-triage. Append-only shape gives safe concurrent multi-agent writes.
